text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tama, do you think you could teach me<n>the trick
to your okonomiyaki some<n>time?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, well there's a first. I'm usually theone asking you for help.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But your okonomiyaki is just sooo good...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I try, I can't<n>seem to
get it right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Gotta admit, this feels good. All<n>right, I'll
teach ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But be warned, I'm a strict teacher!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make the perfect one, blooow on it<n>to cool it
down, and then feed it to you<n>myself...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wonder what sort of face you'll<n>make
when you taste it. ♪
